ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the course is offered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "learning_objectives" TEXT /* Learning objectives of the course */,
  "assessment_methods" TEXT /* Methods used to assess student learning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the curriculum course */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number in which the topic is covered */,
  "dates" TEXT /* Date range for the week */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "topic_objectives" TEXT /* Learning objectives for the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_topics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the prerequisite record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has prerequisites */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "prerequisite_type" TEXT /* Type of prerequisite (e.g., required, recommended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classrooms" (
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number of the classroom */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the classroom */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment available in the classroom */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the classroom is located */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of classroom (e.g., lecture, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course scheduled */,
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classroom assigned */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor assigned to the course */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class */,
  "days" TEXT /* Days of the week when the class meets */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., lecture, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_classroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("classroom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment record */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Attendance percentage in the course */,
  "assignment_scores" TEXT /* Scores on assignments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the resource is associated with */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., textbook, online resource) */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link to the resource */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the note */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the note */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the instructor's note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_notes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment record */,
  "feedback_content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback from the student */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "advisor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the advisor */,
  "advisor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the advisor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the advisor belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_advisors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_advisors" (
  "student_advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-advisor record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the advisor was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES academic_advisors ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_support_services" (
  "support_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support service record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of support service provided */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was provided */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_support_services_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
